title: Review Report: A White-Box Analytical Model for FlashAttention-4 Runtime on NVIDIA B200
summary: Skeptical review of the FA4 B200 white-box runtime predictor draft. The empirical result is strong and traceable, but the manuscript misstates what was calibrated in the combined model. Route: revise.

review_mode.review_followup_policy: single-round text correction, then re-review or finalize
review_mode.manuscript_edit_mode: targeted revision; no new experiments required
review_mode.source_compile_preference: Tectonic first; LaTeX engine fallback only when required or blocked
review_mode.manuscript_source_status: draft-section-set ready for revision; source is Markdown

top_risks: Combined-model calibration factors misstated (claims six calibrated, evidence shows four calibrated + fixed defaults)

strengths: Complete manuscript structure covering all outline sections
Core numerical claims traceable to validation_metrics.json and combined_predictions.csv
Explicit emulator caveat keeps claim boundary clear
Clean ablation design isolating occupancy, bandwidth, and precision effects
weaknesses: Calibration-factor misstatement between manuscript and code/artifact
References section delegates FlashAttention-1/2/3 citations to the scouting report

key_issues.title: Combined-model calibration factors misstated
key_issues.why_it_matters: Misrepresents the interpretability claim; reviewer will check calibration artifact and code.
key_issues.evidence_anchor: calibration_params.json and calibrate.py in operation set 20260704-130224-experiment-7f255a5e

key_issues.title: Placeholder citations and incomplete references
key_issues.why_it_matters: Prevents submission readiness and undermines Related Work positioning.
key_issues.evidence_anchor: draft-section-set.md Related Work and References sections

actionable_suggestions.problem: Combined model described as calibrating six factors
actionable_suggestions.cause: Ablation values copied into combined-model description
actionable_suggestions.actionable_fix: State combined model calibrates four factors and fixes l2_factor/tma_factor/smem_factor at defaults
actionable_suggestions.acceptance_criterion: Every calibration claim matches calibration_params.json and calibrate.py

actionable_suggestions.actionable_fix: Resolve placeholders against literature scouting reports and add full BibTeX
actionable_suggestions.acceptance_criterion: No bracket-style placeholders remain; every cited work has BibTeX

actionable_suggestions.actionable_fix: Generate figures from combined_predictions.csv and validation_metrics.json
actionable_suggestions.acceptance_criterion: Figure files exist and are correctly referenced

experiment_inventory.existing_coverage: All required metrics, ablations, and predictions already produced.
experiment_inventory.text_only_gaps: Calibration description, citations, and figure rendering.
